raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 527 aims to restore parents' ability to coach school sports without restrictions imposed by Assembly Bill 5.",
    "Assembly Bill 5 has overregulated parental coaching, harming businesses and stripping parents of the ability to coach their children's sports teams.",
    "Current law requires volunteer coaches to be treated as employees under AB 5, creating financial burdens for schools.",
    "Schools are struggling to maintain sports programs due to the financial burdens created by the classification of volunteer coaches as employees.",
    "Senate Bill 527 would exempt walk-on coaches from the provisions of AB 5, allowing them to coach sports teams at K-12 schools."
  ]
}
```
